description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:latest Docker image and includes a before_script that runs `python -V` and installs Pipenv with `pip install pipenv`. Define a job named test that runs in the default test stage, executing the commands `pipenv sync --dev` and then `pipenv run lint`. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined, so the job runs on every pipeline execution. This pipeline simply validates the Python environment and lints the code using Pipenv.
